Who I Am

Just a creative guy who learned to speak the language of numbers.

Started as a video editor and script writer. Gradually took on more. Content strategy, brand building, performance marketing, influencer campaigns, TV integrations. Every skill was picked up because the work needed it.

From Andhra Pradesh, 25.

03 YouTube Growth

South India YouTube

When I joined, Jar's YouTube had no real system. I built one — and then ran it. Topic selection, scripting, thumbnail, production, publishing. Every step. The channel runs differently now because of that work. Produced 3 videos crossing 1 lakh views and 6 crossing 50K across South India, organically.
